tasks.title: Verify streaming response format
tasks.prompt: Send a simple chat completion request to the provider and verify that the response body contains at least one content block with type 'text'. Do not make any changes to the codebase.

tasks.title: Verify tool calling roundtrip
tasks.prompt: Send a prompt that requests using the 'read_file' tool to read README.md. Verify the provider returns a tool_use block. Do not execute the tool or modify code.

tasks.title: Verify usage field mapping
tasks.prompt: Send a single-turn chat completion and verify the response includes usage fields (input_tokens, output_tokens). Check that the tracked cost is a positive number.

tasks.title: Verify cache control support
tasks.prompt: Send two identical requests and verify the second response has a lower cost or cache-hit indicator. Do not modify any source files.

tasks.title: Verify error response format
tasks.prompt: Send a request with an intentionally invalid parameter and verify the provider returns a structured error response (not a 500 HTML page).
